purpose: Machine-readable handoff so any agent (Codex, Claude, other) can take over cold. Read the referenced md files for full detail — this file is the index.

repo.vcs: git, branch master, remote origin=https://github.com/dkadaj75-dev/condo-life-web.git (NEVER pushed — local only; push only if the designer asks)
repo.run: npm run dev (node server.js, port 5173; serves game + tools + GET/PUT /api/data/<path>; game hot-reload-polls /data/*.json every 2s)

designer.who: Septentrion — NOT a programmer; drives everything through the browser tools and plain-language batches
workflow_rules: Designer playtests constantly: uncommitted data/*.json / public asset changes in the tree are THEIRS — commit separately as 'Designer data edits via tools', NEVER revert, never mix into code commits
One commit per slice, imperative subject; verify (tests+tsc+boot) BEFORE committing
Designer pastes Windows file paths into tools — normalize to URLs under public/

architecture.stack: Vite + three.js + TypeScript, PWA (manifest+SW: network-only /data+/api, never cache them)
architecture.principle: Everything data-driven: if the designer might change it, it is a JSON field with a tool UI, not code. No magic numbers — tunables in data/tuning.json.
architecture.game_modules_pattern: game/*.ts = pure headless-testable logic + thin three.js/UI layer. Precedents: doors, accidents, sprites, marker, quests, visas, work, phone, garbage, buymode, bills, food, happiness, censor, progressbar, bladder, duration, wallview, windows, camera, facing, nav, audio, fbxclips, sprites, contextmenu (in ui), work.
architecture.tools_pattern: tools/*.html: plain inline script exposed as window.<Tool> (jsdom-testable) + separate type=module script only when three.js/game imports needed; tools import game logic, never reimplement; PUT whole files JSON.stringify(data,null,2); shared tools/nav.js tab strip (add new tools to its TOOLS list)
architecture.sim_time_rule: All gameplay animation/timers run on sim-time sdt (pause/buy-mode/game-over freeze, 2x/3x scale); real-time only for cosmetics
architecture.side_effect_rule: Action side effects (cleanup, waste, accident rolls, completion products, promotion rolls) fire ONLY on completed actions (stopAction(completed=true)) — never on cancels/interrupts

data_files.data/assets.json: AssetDef: category (incl. transient/door/window), mesh (GLB or image/GIF sprite), icon, buyable, requiresQuestUnlock, footprint, facingDeg, meshFit, usePose/useLocations, useFacingTarget, surfaceSockets[{offset,y,rotationDeg}], placeableOnSurface, carryHandle[x,y,z], carryBone, interactions[], container{capacity}, containerSpace, environmentScore/needMultipliers, sound, accidents[] risk, combustibility, clearedBy, food{hungerGain,perishHours,rottenAssetId}, survivalImportance, light, wallMounted, door, sprite; legacy garbage{capacity} remains readable
data_files.data/interactions.json: ActionDef: animation, pose(sit|lie|use; explicit world placement independent of animation label), autonomyEligible, seatAware, seatSearch(targetFacing|nearest), censor, primaryNeed, needGains/skillGains, conditions, duration, cost (affordability checked before order; charged on completion), requiredAsset{assetId,alternativeAssetIds?,radiusMeters,visitBefore?,visitAfter?}, spawnsAsset{assetId,actionId?,applyCookingSkill?}, containerTransfer(deposit to containerAssetId | empty at destinationAssetId), sound, producesWaste, carriedAsset{assetId,bone,offset,rotationDeg,scale,lockRotationAxes{x,y,z},dropOnInterrupt?}, consumesFood; discardsFood remains legacy compatibility
data_files.data/stats.json: needs / skills (growth curve tuning.skills.growthCurveExp makes high levels slower) / personality (static traits, e.g. cleanliness)
data_files.data/tuning.json: All tunables: character(+marker), camera(+rotate/twist), doors, fire(+panicSeconds), interaction, surfacePlacement(radiusMeters), audio(+UI/feedback sounds), phone(+icon,jobListSize), work(+autoSpeed,promotionHappinessFactor), bills(intervalDays), bladderFailure, starvation, energyCollapse, feedback, waste, garbage, credit, visa(startStatus), view(wallCutHeight,wallTopColor), skills(growthCurveExp), quests, economy
data_files.data/quests.json + simstate.json: Quests (trigger/completion Condition trees, rewards funds/setVar/unlockAsset/grantVisa) + designer variables (visaStatus, job, income)
data_files.data/visas.json: Visa state machine defs (visitor 15d start, lmia, temp_worker, permanent_resident, citizen; durations/grace/applications)
data_files.data/jobs.json: Jobs: requirements(Condition), grantsVisa, hours, payPerShift, maxSkips, minCreditScore, needsCost, levels[{suffix,payPerShift,promoteChancePercent}]
data_files.data/finance.json: Formula bills/rent (base+perAssetValue*assetTotal; rent by propertyType+floor tiles), overdueDays/tooLateDays/negativeGraceDays
data_files.data/bills.json: Bill id/name list (amounts computed via finance.json)
data_files.data/happiness.json: Weighted happiness formula components (var, weight, min/max)
data_files.data/loading.json: Loading screen: phrases[], phraseIntervalSeconds, music, background, bar{fillColor,trackColor,height}
data_files.data/behavior.json: Autonomy scoring: needWeights, weights{needDeficit,distance,personalityAffinity}, decisionThreshold, condition-gated rules with scoreBonus
data_files.data/theme.json: UI theme: fonts, colors, shapes, per-component overrides, layout{anchor,offsetX/Y,hidden,accordion} per HUD element, accordions
data_files.data/events.json: New.txt #6 event manager: events[] each a named bundle of typed effects (notification/funds/needDelta/spawnTransient/assetState/fireEvent/…), optional condition gate + chancePercent. Ships EMPTY (no behavior change until authored). Edited in tools/events.html; fired via ActionDef.emitsEvent.
data_files.data/notifications.json: Tiered notification config (modal/card/passive) + per-event tier/icon/sound/action. Edited in tools/system.html (Theme Editor edits event icons only).
data_files.data/save.json: Save-system policy: slots, autosave slot/interval/events, storage key prefix. Edited in tools/system.html.
data_files.data/title.json: Title screen: logo/background/music, menu entries, options panel, credits, layout anchors. Edited in tools/system.html.
data_files.data/npcs.json + data/social.json: NPCs + social core (relationship levels, compatibility, interactions incl. multi-asset targetAssets, phone, visit-their-place, happinessScaling). Runtime SocialRuntime now persists an earned ContactBook; quests/jobs grant contacts. Edited in tools/social.html.

tools: tools/assets.html (Asset Editor: everything on AssetDef + 3D preview w/ map-matched grid + sprite/GIF preview + character pose preview checkbox: sit/lie/use posed+animated via real game logic, off by default)
tools/interactions.html (Interaction Editor: all ActionDef fields incl. conditions builder, duration+modifiers, cost, waste, censor; warns on blank animation)
tools/tuning.html (Tuning Editor: generic tuning groups + needs/skills/personality add-remove)

tools/map.html (Map Editor: objects/floors/walls(kind+textures)/doors(on-wall apertures)/windows/spawn, rental ad card, exterior card, multi-map, undo, nav overlay, music + LIVE 3D pane: preview AND direct editing routed through the same 2D state/undo)
tools/animations.html (Animation Mapper: clipMap incl. FBX sources w/ mixamorig retargeting, marker, core states incl. sit_ground/pee/panic/collapse/starve)
tools/quests.html (Quest Editor: condition builder, rewards incl. grantVisa)
tools/career.html (Career Editor: visas + jobs CRUD incl. levels, minCreditScore)
tools/finance.html (Finance Editor: bill/rent formulas, thresholds, live preview, happiness formula card)
tools/behavior.html (Behavior Editor: autonomy weights/rules + live candidate-score preview)
tools/theme.html (Theme Editor: fonts/colors/shapes/layout/accordions + live mocked-HUD preview)

tools/social.html (Social Editor: NPC CRUD w/ stats.json trait sliders, relationship levels, compatibility, sim-to-sim interaction CRUD w/ level gates, phone/visit tuning, live preview via real game/social.ts)

tools/events.html (Event Editor, New.txt #6: designer-authored events = named bundles of effects; effect list w/ reorder, every field a live-data dropdown, shared condition gate, Fired-by panel + cycle warning. Writes events.json)
tools/system.html (System Editor: title.json + notifications.json + save.json — logo/menu/options, per-tier + per-event notification config, save slots/autosave/prefix)

tools/pathnorm.js + tools/refscan.js (shared tool helpers: window.PathNorm = the ONE Windows-path->public/ reducer all tools delegate to; window.RefScan warns about dangling cross-file references after a delete)

verification_gates.typescript: npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target es2020 --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --skipLibCheck game/*.ts
verification_gates.pure_suites: npx tsx test/<name>.test.ts (ONE at a time). Suites include quests, visas, work, phone, bills, actionchain, actionprops, food, carry, surfaces, garbage, accidents, doors, windows, wallview, facing, usepose, seatground, occupancy, duration, marker, camera, stats, happiness, contextmenu, buymode, nav, social, npc, contacts, save-wiring, locomotion.smoke, meshfit(tsx only)
verification_gates.jsdom_suites: node test/*.test.mjs + node tools/*.test.mjs (asset/tuning/interaction/quest/career/finance/social editors, map-editor(SELF-DERIVING fixtures — keep it that way), animation-editor, toolnav, sw-routing, bills/hud smoke)
verification_gates.boot: GET http://localhost:5173 must boot (#boot gets class 'done'), zero new console errors

state_summary.latest_batch: PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.73: async frame/pane GLB adoption now neutralizes and restores the door root's full transform, so a pane loaded after Cut front inherits the cut scale instead of cancelling it and floating full-height.
state_summary.shipped: Full sim loop (needs/skills/personality/autonomy/poses), quests, doors/windows/exterior door, wall-cut view, accidents+fire spread/destruction, transients, garbage/tidying+carry, carried food+perish+action costs, buy/sell mode (floor-only, wall-mount rules), PWA/mobile, audio (actions/assets/music/UI+feedback sounds), camera pan/pinch/rotate, sprites/GIF visuals, overhead marker, censor, progress bars (aligned), duration system w/ multi-var modifiers, interaction conditions, contextual radial action menu, asset lights+ON/OFF state, wall-mounted assets, VISA system (game over), phone (HUD icon, jobs, applications, bills, credit), going to work (hide+5x+pay+needsCost+skips), job levels+happiness-scaled promotions, finance (formula bills/rent, debt, repo man, credit score), bladder/energy/hunger failure events, skill/money floating feedback, 0.5m grid/0.25 snap. BATCH 7: Asset Editor preview shows in-game size grounded at y=0 (game transforms applied live); cooked-meal hunger scales with cooking skill (tuning.food); fridge-walk root cause fixed (food actions defer seat to second leg); progress bar camera-space anchoring fix (world-space offset projected wrong under isometric camera); work departure window (tuning.work.departureWindowHours, missed=skip at window close) + autonomous departure (happiness>=40 & energy>=25, tunable, wakes from sleep); LOADING SCREEN (real asset-load gate, sim time frozen, data/loading.json: phrases/music/background/bar, Tuning Editor Loading card, pure game/loading.ts). BATCH 8: utility-based autonomy (data/behavior.json needWeights/distance/personality-affinity weights + condition-gated rules; pure game/behavior.ts scoring differentiates assets by per-action gain rates, legacy lowest-need fallback) with Behavior Editor (tools/behavior.html, live ranked candidate-score preview via real scoring fns); UI theme system (data/theme.json -> game/theme.ts CSS custom properties, per-component overrides, anchor/offset/hidden layout per HUD element, accordion grouping, default reproduces prior look) with Theme Editor (tools/theme.html, live mocked-HUD preview). BATCH 9: floor/wall textures — floors[].texture / walls[].texture (public/textures drop-in), physical tiling via tuning.textures.metersPerTile, color fallback; GET /api/textures listing; Map Editor texture dropdowns + preview swatches in Floors/Walls inspectors. BATCH 10: black wall tops — every wall's top face is a shared unlit flat material (tuning.view.wallTopColor, default #000000), untextured regardless of texture/textureB, survives the wall-cut view (architecture-plan look); Asset Editor character pose preview — view-only 'Show character' checkbox (off by default) + always-offered sit/lie/use selector, rigged character loaded via the game's loadRiggedCharacter, default use preview positioned by real useSpotFor and authored use by usePoseFor, animated by the real AnimController, and labeled computed default vs authored (PROJECT_CONTEXT §7.33); B10-6..B10-8 add sparse source-first seat routing for bookshelf reading/study, preserve Practice English's seat-authored facing, and retain exact walkable restoration endpoints; B10-12 separates that safe endpoint from generic standing actions' precise useSpotFor point so cooking alignment and later navigation both hold (PROJECT_CONTEXT §7.34). APT BATCH 11 (partial): D1 door-in-plain-wall apertures (game/wallaperture.ts, on-wall doors matched geometrically, solid+lintel segments, Map Editor on-wall placement, PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.39); R1-R4 rental system — MapData.rental ads (shared tools/condition-builder.js), pure game/rental.ts listings, Kijiji phone tab, PendingMoveTracker + runtime map switch with simstate homeMap (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.40, ROADMAP_APT SHIPPED notes). B10-14..21: garbage fill bar (+occlusion), 3-axis meshFit offset, per-asset needMultipliers, abandoned-food waste fix, per-action meal tiers, skill progress bar, fullest-can trash routing. NEW.TXT BATCH (2026-07-20): (1) adaptive radial action menu — buttons widen to fit long names and the ring grows / falls back to a list so they never overlap (game/ui.ts minRadialRadius, PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.x New.txt#1); (2) Social Editor multi-asset targets w/ add/remove rows (targetAssets); (3) GENERALIZED ASSET STATES (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.55) — designer-defined states replace hardcoded on/off (AssetStateDef: per-state mesh/interactions/footprint/blocksNav; ActionDef.setsState transitions; autonomy plans THROUGH states via planToReachAction/resolveOrderAction — closed murphy bed -> open -> sleep; per-state nav bake; save-compatible both ways; legacy on/off byte-identical); (4) EVENT MANAGER E1-E3 (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.56, ROADMAP_EVENTS) — pure game/events.ts dispatcher, 12 effect types each mapping onto an existing subsystem, ActionDef.emitsEvent trigger, Events tool, data/events.json ships empty. EARLIER 2026-07-19: happiness-as-multiplier (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.51, ROADMAP_HAPPY H1-H5), screen-overlay + per-state-mesh visuals (7.50), System Editor (7.52), full tool-audit closeout (AUDIT_TOOLS, 7.53-7.54: refscan + pathnorm shared helpers, shared condition builder across all editors, categories/visitorActions/computed-need surfaces). NEW.TXT #4 (PROJECT_CONTEXT 7.57): Asset Editor feature-categories (electronics/comfort/plumbing/garbage/kitchen) show/hide cards; AssetDef.featureCategories is EDITOR-ONLY (runtime ignores). NEW.TXT #5 (7.58): AssetDef.useLocations = multiple sit/lie locations; game/occupancy.ts + SimAgent onClaimSeat/onReleaseSeat wire ONE shared OccupancyRegistry so player AND NPCs each take the CLOSEST AVAILABLE location (single-location assets byte-identical to before). usePoseFor refactored onto usePoseForEntry. Asset Editor Seat-locations card w/ per-location preview. Occupancy TRANSIENT in v1 (serialize/restore exist, not yet save-wired).

state_summary.commit_head_note: HEAD 2026-07-20: New.txt #1-#6 all committed (#6 event manager is E1-E3 of a 5-phase plan). Designer data (Old Stove asset, interactions tuning) committed separately per AGENTS.md. Nothing pushed.

next_steps: Event manager E4/E5 (ROADMAP_EVENTS) — remaining triggers (AssetStateDef.onEnter, quest reward {type:event}, accident spawn, social) + opt-in migration of hardcoded postNotification sites. FOUR OPEN DESIGNER QUESTIONS in ROADMAP_EVENTS §6 (notably: plumbing leak as an accident that EMITS an event).

Multi-location seating (New.txt #5) follow-up: occupancy is TRANSIENT (empty on load). If a save taken mid-sit should keep its claim, register OccupancyRegistry.serialize/restore in game/savewiring.ts (the methods already exist).

Event manager E4 (ROADMAP_EVENTS): remaining triggers — AssetStateDef.onEnter, quest reward {type:event}, accident spawn, social interaction. E5: opt-in migration of hardcoded postNotification call sites onto events. FOUR OPEN DESIGNER QUESTIONS in ROADMAP_EVENTS §6 (notably: make the plumbing leak an accident that EMITS an event, not a pure event).

SHIPPED 2026-07-18: the save system (ROADMAP_SAVE V1-V4 — envelope/slots/autosave/phone Save tab/title Load screen). Remaining save work: V5 designer playtest pass; future: cloud sync would need a login backend (designer briefed, deferred)
Designer to delete the legacy placed 'phone' asset (smartphone HUD icon replaced it)
Non-payment-of-bills consequences beyond repo (recorded in ROADMAP B4-1 as deferred)

Designer authoring passes: quests granting upgrade visas, Animation Mapper clips for sit_ground/pee/panic/collapse/starve/extinguishing_fire/cleaning, real sounds replacing placeholder WAVs, real meshes for remaining stand-ins
Playtest-only outstanding: radial menu touch, camera twist device, lights/wall-mounts visuals, repo-man flow, loading screen on slow network, auto-depart-to-work behavior
known_quirks: test/meshfit.test.mjs passes only under npx tsx, never plain node (documented, ignore)
Sandboxed browser panes can't run WebGL/rAF — verify boot via #boot.done + console, not screenshots
Stove fire baseChancePercent may be a testing value (designer toggles it)
Windows CRLF warnings on git are noise
Sandboxed browser pane freezes CSS transitions too (computed opacity stuck at start value) — disable transition to read the real end state
Progress-bar lesson: THREE.Sprite offsets are CAMERA-space; never anchor a sprite by world-space offsets
After server.js changes the designer must restart npm run dev (old process lacks new endpoints, e.g. /api/textures)
